The pack closes the RP06.P07 failure-taxonomy tail (M06 fixture rows + M07-M10) and opens the RP06.P08 Hermes-receipt foundation (Scope Inventory, Contract Draft, Type And Shape Definition) as eight descriptor-only sections.

Coverage verified: DMS_CORE_CP227_PACK_BINDING matches the baseline exactly (risk C, 150 units, range, upstream CP00-226, next CP00-228, next subphase RP06.P08.M02.S15). Phase counts (RP06.P07:106 + RP06.P08:44 = 150), micro-phase counts, micro-title counts, and deliverable counts (failure_recovery:55, hermes_evidence:38, implementation:24, test:11, security_audit:10, claude_review:7, fixture:5) all reconcile to 150 and match the prompt distributions. Partial sections handled correctly (M06 = 17 rows S06-S22; M02 = 14 rows ending at BLOCK semantics). closeout-pack-plan.json confirms CP00-227 is the live cursor pack (live_next_unit_id RP06.P07.M06.S06).

Implementation verified: registry.js (binding, no-write attestation extending CP226 with regression_detected:false, requirements), service.js (descriptor/case-set builders are pure functions; all no-write/no-runtime flags false; authority_boundary.claude_is_final_approval:false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening:true), validators.js (coverage + descriptor validators enforce descriptor-only rows, Hermes sections not emitting runtime receipts, PASS/BLOCK semantics, no silent success, no cross-tenant access, Claude not final approver, no enterprise-trust-from-local-validation). index.js re-exports via export * (explains why it is an impl ref but unmodified). README CP00-227 anchor present; contracts/dms-core-contract.json current_pack=CP00-227 with matching p07_closeout_p08_hermes_receipt_descriptor projection. Grep of changed sources found no writeFile/fs/child_process/fetch/.query runtime calls.

Tests/validation: model.test.js has three CP227 tests asserting coverage.valid, descriptor-only rows, verdict semantics, human-approval marker, claude_final_approval_claimed:false, authority boundary, and handoff to CP00-228. validate-rp06-dms-core-contract.mjs adds plan-existence, contract current_pack, coverage, descriptor, and no-write attestation assertions. command-evidence.json records all 18 commands (node --check/--test, all npm validates, npm test, npm run validate/build, git diff --check) at exit 0.

Boundaries honored: production_ready:false with status implemented_pending_review/pending_final_closeout (no premature enterprise-trust claim); no_real_data:true; writes_product_state:false. Hermes control-plane patterns are descriptor-only (emits_hermes_runtime_receipt:false, receipt_shape descriptor_only_..._no_write) and not embedded in product runtime. Claude remains read-only independent reviewer, not final approver; human final approval still required.

CP178+ review hardening: forbidden_review_evidence encodes auth_failure, stdout_0_bytes, malformed_json, fenced_json_plus_prose, tool_call_shaped_output, claude_final_approval_claim, source_mutation_claim, production_or_enterprise_trust_claim; hardened_review_sequence keeps Claude as a single read-only capture step ahead of normalize/receipt_validate/adjudication/final_closeout_validation. readiness-report auth-preflight passed (exit 0, 1456-byte valid JSON, no errors). No pre-baked raw-output.json/review-receipt.json/claude-review-result.json exists, so the verdict is not predetermined. Unrelated dirty/untracked files (spec-v2-integration, loop-system-integration, enterprise-v2-loop-roadmap, ldip invalid-attempt, the .docx) are correctly classified as unrelated_dirty_files_preserved and excluded from this pack per scope guidance.

No P0/P1/P2/P3 defects, coverage gaps, or boundary violations attributable to CP00-227.
